# GSL-Lang

> A declarative graph specification language for describing directed graphs with attributes and set-based grouping. This repository contains the normative specification, reference implementation (Go), query language (GQL) extension, CLI tools, LSP server, and VS Code integration.

## Core Language

- [SPEC.md](SPEC.md): Normative specification for GSL v1.0 (RFC 2119)
- [GRAMMAR.md](GRAMMAR.md): Formal grammar (EBNF)
- [LLM_GUIDE.md](LLM_GUIDE.md): Self-contained language guide for LLMs — syntax, semantics, API, gotchas
- [GO_GUIDE.md](GO_GUIDE.md): Go API patterns and algorithms

## Query Language (GQL)

- [QUERY_SPEC.md](query/QUERY_SPEC.md): Query language specification
- [QUERY_GRAMMAR.md](query/QUERY_GRAMMAR.md): Query language formal grammar
- [QUERY_AI_GUIDE.md](query/QUERY_AI_GUIDE.md): Self-contained query language guide for LLMs

## Getting Started

- [README.md](README.md): User-facing overview, quick start, and usage examples
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Development guide for AI agents contributing to this repo

## Implementation

- [Go reference implementation](go/): Core parser, lexer, AST, graph model, serializer
- [CLI tools](cmd/): gsl-diagram (Mermaid/PlantUML), gsl-query (query runner)
- [LSP server](lsp/): Language server protocol implementation
- [VS Code extension](editors/vscode/): Syntax highlighting and IDE support
